meta.title: TAL RESORT — Aqua & SPA
meta.description: The art of family relaxation, one hour from Almaty. Thermal pools, SPA, baths and cottages at the foot of the Talgar mountains.

hero.title: The art of family relaxation
hero.lead: 40° thermal pools, cedar baths and a SPA at the foot of the Talgar mountains.

aqua.title: Aqua zone & SPA
aqua.lead: Heated pools, five slides and thermal zones for the whole family.

baths.title: Baths
baths.lead: Altai cedar, Russian and salt — a ritual of heat and steam.

stay.title: Stay
stay.lead: Rooms and cottages where city comfort meets the wild.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.lead: A la carte by the fireplace and an Eastern terrace all day long.

prices.title: Day pass
prices.lead: Access to the aqua zone and SPA from 10:00 to 23:00.

location.title: Getting here
location.lead: Talgar district, Almaty region — just an hour from central Almaty.
